description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of classic Les Paul models. The body features a vibrant, flame maple top with a sunburst orange finish, and the front is equipped with two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, a three-way toggle switch, and a fixed bridge. The neck is set-in and made of wood, leading to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side. The back of the guitar shows a control cavity cover and a smooth, contoured finish. The hardware, including the bridge, tuning pegs, and pickup covers, appears to be metallic, likely chrome or nickel-plated. The overall construction suggests a high-quality instrument suitable for professional use in urban music settings.
description: A sunburst orange, single-cutaway electric guitar with dual humbuckers, chrome hardware, and a contoured wooden body.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the contoured wooden back, control cavity cover, and the neck with tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sunburst finish, dual humbucker pickups, four control knobs, toggle switch, and fixed bridge.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the edge of the body and the headstock with tuning pegs.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning pegs, classic Les Paul shape, no visible logo
